overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse through grasslands and approaching a cliff with a waterfall. The clip transitions from lush green prairie to dry grassland and finally to a rocky canyon vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie trail with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot along a winding dirt path through lush green grassland

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through the grassland
mature oak trees with dense green canopies scattered across the landscape
large boulders and rock formations dotting the grassy fields

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse rider traveling along a dirt trail through lush green grasslands. Scattered oak trees and rock formations dot the landscape under a clear blue sky. The camera maintains a steady follow position as the horse moves at a consistent trot through the open prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with dry grass approaching elevated terrain

events.description: distant mountain range becomes visible on the horizon as the terrain opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through drier prairie landscape with scattered trees and distant mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: hazy blue mountains visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The landscape transitions to drier, golden-colored grassland as the rider continues along the trail. The vegetation becomes sparser and distant mountains appear on the horizon. The terrain gradually begins to ascend as the horse approaches an elevated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge overlooking canyon with waterfall

events.description: horse leaves the dirt trail and begins ascending rocky terrain toward cliff edge
waterfall and canyon river come into view as the horse reaches the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: riding up rocky terrain and slowing to a stop at the cliff edge to overlook the waterfall and canyon below

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down the canyon wall with mist creating a rainbow
wide river flowing through the canyon below with sandy shoreline
steep rocky precipice overlooking the canyon depths

segments.scene_description: The horse leaves the trail and climbs onto rocky terrain, approaching a dramatic cliff edge. A stunning vista reveals a waterfall cascading into a deep canyon with a river below. The camera stops at the edge, showcasing the steep drop-off and the natural arch of a rainbow forming in the waterfall's mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a horse rider traveling from lush green prairies toward a dramatic rocky canyon vista. It begins with a steady follow behind the rider as they trot along a dirt trail through vibrant grasslands dotted with oak trees and rock formations under a clear blue sky. As the journey continues, the landscape shifts into drier, golden-colored grasslands with sparser vegetation and distant mountains appearing on the horizon. The terrain then gradually ascends, leading the horse off the trail and onto rugged rocky ground. The scene finally opens up at a steep cliff edge, revealing a cascading waterfall and a river below, complete with a rainbow forming in the mist.
